stories.headline: OpenAI Releases GPT-5.5 Instant as New Default Model for ChatGPT
stories.key_takeaway: OpenAI replaced ChatGPTs default model with GPT-5.5 Instant, cutting hallucinations by 52.5% on high-stakes prompts and reducing response verbosity by 30%.

pull_quote.text: We are going to do it.

data_points.label: Fewer hallucinated claims on high-stakes prompts
Fewer inaccurate claims on flagged conversations

stories.article_excerpt: OpenAI on Monday replaced the engine powering the worlds most widely used AI chatbot, rolling out GPT-5.5 Instant as ChatGPTs new default...

stories.headline: Sierra Raises $950 Million Series E at $15.8 Billion Valuation to Scale AI Customer Agents
stories.key_takeaway: Sierras $950M Series E at $15.8B valuation makes it the best-capitalized pure-play AI customer agent company, with $150M ARR and 40% of Fortune 50 as customers.

pull_quote.text: We are multiples larger than the next biggest and are trying to invest aggressively so that we can continue to expand our lead.

stories.article_excerpt: Sierra, the enterprise AI company co-founded by OpenAI Chairman Bret Taylor, has closed a massive $950 million Series E round...

stories.headline: Cerebras Targets $3.5 Billion IPO at $26.6 Billion Valuation in Largest AI Chip Listing of 2026
stories.key_takeaway: Cerebras is seeking to raise $3.5 billion at a $26.6 billion valuation in the largest AI chip IPO of 2026, backed by a $20B+ OpenAI compute contract.

pull_quote.text: We built a chip that turns inference into a throughput problem rather than a latency problem.

stories.article_excerpt: Cerebras Systems filed updated IPO terms targeting up to $3.5 billion in a Nasdaq listing at $26.6 billion valuation...

stories.headline: Foxconn Posts Record April Revenue as AI Server Demand Drives 30 Percent Surge
stories.key_takeaway: Foxconn reported record April revenue of NT$832.1 billion, up 29.74% year-over-year, driven by surging AI server rack demand.

pull_quote.text: We are very optimistic about AI-driven demand and expect high double-digit growth.

data_points.label: Global AI server rack market share
Racks assembled per week at US facility

stories.article_excerpt: Foxconn reported consolidated revenue of NT$832.1 billion for April 2026, a record for the month driven by AI server demand...

stories.headline: PayPal Pitches AI-Led Turnaround With $1.5 Billion Savings Plan and 20 Percent Workforce Cut
stories.key_takeaway: PayPals new CEO Enrique Lores is betting on an AI-led restructuring targeting $1.5B in savings, including cutting 20% of its workforce.

pull_quote.text: We need to recommit to the fundamentals. That means becoming a technology company again.

stories.article_excerpt: PayPal is pitching an AI-led turnaround, tying automation and restructuring to $1.5 billion in savings as it cuts jobs...

stories.headline: SoftBank Eyes $100 Billion IPO for Roze, a New AI Robotics Unit to Build Data Centers
stories.key_takeaway: SoftBank is consolidating ABB Robotics, Ampere Computing, and DigitalBridge into Roze, targeting a $100B US IPO to deploy autonomous robots for data center construction.

pull_quote.text: The lesson of Katerra and WeWork is that capital cannot fix construction by itself. Roze will need to ship robots that work in unstructured job sites.

stories.article_excerpt: Masayoshi Son is placing his biggest bet yet on the physical backbone of AI. SoftBank is preparing to spin out Roze...

stories.headline: NHS Orders Hundreds of GitHub Repositories Closed Over AI Security Fears
stories.key_takeaway: NHS Englands SDLC-8 directive mandates all GitHub repos be private by May 11, citing AI-assisted vulnerability scanning fears linked to Anthropics Mythos model.

pull_quote.text: Depublishing public code is not a security strategy. Security through obscurity has been debunked as a security measure for a long time.

data_points.label: Signatories on open letter opposing the move

stories.article_excerpt: Englands National Health Service has ordered staff to make hundreds of public source code repositories private within days...

stories.headline: OpenAI Turns Sold-Out GPT-5.5 Party Into Month-Long Codex Giveaway for 8,000 Developers
stories.key_takeaway: OpenAI gave all 8,000+ GPT-5.5 party applicants a tenfold Codex rate limit boost through June 5, regardless of invitation status.

pull_quote.text: Do something nice for everyone who applied for the GPT-5.5 party and that we did not have space for.

data_points.label: Token context window for GPT-5.5 in Codex

stories.article_excerpt: When more than 8,000 developers scrambled to RSVP for OpenAIs invite-only GPT-5.5 launch party, the company converted overflow...

stories.headline: Cadence and NVIDIA Expand Partnership to Close the Sim-to-Real Gap in Robotics
stories.key_takeaway: Cadence and NVIDIA are combining high-fidelity multiphysics simulation with AI world models to create an end-to-end pipeline addressing robotics sim-to-real transfer.

pull_quote.text: The more accurate the generated training data is, the better the model will be.

data_points.label: Productivity gains from Cadence ChipStack AI

stories.article_excerpt: Training a robot in simulation is easy. Getting that robot to perform the same way in the real world is the hard part...

stories.headline: Meta Acquires Robotics Startup Assured Robot Intelligence to Bolster Humanoid AI Ambitions
stories.key_takeaway: Meta acquired 20-person robotics startup ARI to integrate humanoid foundation model expertise into Superintelligence Labs, entering the $5 trillion humanoid robotics market.

pull_quote.text: When we started ARI one year ago, our mission was clear: achieve physical AGI.

stories.article_excerpt: Meta has acquired Assured Robot Intelligence, a 20-person startup building foundation models for humanoid robots...

stories.headline: Alex AI Named to CB Insights AI 100 as First Recruiting Platform on Prestigious List
stories.key_takeaway: Alex AI becomes the first recruiting software company named to CB Insights AI 100, validating agentic AIs expansion into enterprise talent acquisition.

pull_quote.text: Its a testament to every Alexians hard work and to our customers dedication to delivering the best recruiting experience for their applicants.

data_points.label: Total equity funding raised by 2026 AI 100 cohort
Annual edition of CB Insights AI 100

stories.article_excerpt: A San Francisco startup that sends AI agents to conduct job interviews just earned a spot on one of techs most watched lists...

stories.headline: University of Hawaii Algorithm Teaches AI to Obey the Laws of Physics for Climate and Fluid Modeling
stories.key_takeaway: University of Hawaii researchers developed a neural network that embeds conservation laws as hard structural constraints, reducing conservation errors by four orders of magnitude.

pull_quote.text: The key insight is that you cannot simply ask a neural network to learn physics -- you have to build physics into the architecture itself.

data_points.label: Conservation error reduction vs standard PINNs
Energy balance maintained over 50 simulated years

stories.article_excerpt: The University of Hawaii team developed an architectural approach that embeds conservation laws as hard constraints directly into neural networks...

stories.headline: Apples SimpleFold Shows Standard Transformers Can Match AlphaFold for Protein Structure Prediction
stories.key_takeaway: Apples SimpleFold uses standard transformer blocks to recover over 95% of AlphaFold2s accuracy while running on consumer laptop hardware.

pull_quote.text: SimpleFold charts a new course for computational structural biology defined by simplicity, efficiency, and accessibility.

data_points.label: Distilled protein structures used in training
Inference time for 512-residue protein on M2 Max

stories.article_excerpt: Apples researchers demonstrated that none of AlphaFolds architectural complexity may be necessary, using standard transformer blocks...

stories.headline: UPenn Researchers Introduce Mollifier Layers to Solve Inverse Partial Differential Equations With Neural Networks
stories.key_takeaway: UPenn developed Mollifier Layers, reducing memory and training time by 6-10x for inverse PDE problems by replacing recursive automatic differentiation with analytic convolution.

pull_quote.text: Modern AI often advances by scaling up computation. But some scientific challenges require better mathematics, not just more compute.

data_points.label: Reduction in memory and training time
Chromatin domains studied with mollifier layers

stories.article_excerpt: UPenn researchers developed Mollifier Layers, borrowing an 80-year-old mathematical smoothing technique for modern AI architectures...

stories.headline: Meta FAIR Shows Replay Buffers Can Slash the Cost of Reinforcement Learning for Large Language Models
stories.key_takeaway: Meta FAIR demonstrates that a simple FIFO replay buffer can reduce LLM reinforcement learning compute costs by up to 40% without degrading performance.

pull_quote.text: A well-designed replay buffer can drastically reduce inference compute without degrading and in some cases even improving final model performance.

stories.article_excerpt: A new paper from Meta FAIR argues that throwing away RL training data is not only unnecessary but harmful, and replay buffers cut compute by 40%...
